use_cases: Landing page hero section for tech and SaaS products seeking a futuristic, immersive first impression
Product showcases requiring high visual impact with animated 3D elements and post-processing effects
Developer tools and software landing pages wanting a cutting-edge, sci-fi aesthetic
ai_summary: A futuristic 3D hero component built with React Three Fiber and WebGPU, featuring animated post-processing effects including bloom and a dynamic scanning line overlay. The component uses texture mapping and depth effects to create an immersive, sci-fi visual experience suitable for tech-forward landing pages. Supports desktop and mobile platforms with scroll-triggered animations and continuous ambient motion.
